query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active') as total_active, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM projectBusinessLineScores) as scored, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active') - (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM projectBusinessLineScores) as unscored
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active') as total_active, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM projectBusinessLineScores) as scored, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active') - (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM projectBusinessLineScores) as unscored
